Name: WEAPON_TYPE_PARAM
Description: Defines configuration values that control weapon behavior, animations, combat interactions, and stat scaling across different weapon types.

Fields.Name: Spell Usage Allowed: Sorcery
Fields.Description: Determines whether this weapon type can be used to cast sorceries.

Fields.Name: Spell Usage Allowed: Miracles
Fields.Description: Determines whether this weapon type can be used to cast miracles.

Fields.Name: Spell Usage Allowed: Pyromancy
Fields.Description: Determines whether this weapon type can be used to cast pyromancies.

Fields.Name: Spell Usage Allowed: Dark Magic
Fields.Description: Determines whether this weapon type can be used to cast dark sorceries or hexes.

Fields.Name: Equip Animation: 1H RH Stance
Fields.Description: Animation ID used when holding a weapon 1H in the RH.

Fields.Name: Equip Animation: 1H LH Stance
Fields.Description: Animation ID used when holding a weapon 1H in the LH.

Fields.Name: Equip Animation: 2H RH Stance
Fields.Description: Animation ID used when 2Hing a weapon primarily held in the RH.

Fields.Name: Equip Animation: 2H LH Stance
Fields.Description: Animation ID used when 2Hing a weapon primarily held in the LH.

Fields.Name: Equip Animation: DW 1H RH Stance
Fields.Description: Animation ID for RH weapon stance when DWing 1H weapons.

Fields.Name: Equip Animation: DW 1H LH Stance
Fields.Description: Animation ID for LH weapon stance when DWing 1H weapons.

Fields.Name: Equip Animation: DW 2H RH Stance
Fields.Description: Animation ID for RH stance when DWing with 2H style.

Fields.Name: Equip Animation: DW 2H LH Stance
Fields.Description: Animation ID for LH stance when DWing with 2H style.

Fields.Name: Equip Animation: Weapon Swap
Fields.Description: Animation played when switching or equipping weapons.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: 1H Stance RH Character
Fields.Description: Reference ID for character model positioning in RH 1H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: 1H Stance RH Weapon
Fields.Description: Reference ID for weapon model positioning in RH 1H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: 1H Stance LH Character
Fields.Description: Reference ID for character model positioning in LH 1H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: 1H Stance LH Weapon
Fields.Description: Reference ID for weapon model positioning in LH 1H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: Right 2H Stance Main Character
Fields.Description: Character alignment reference for RH 2H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: Right 2H Stance Main Weapon
Fields.Description: Weapon alignment reference for RH 2H 2H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: Right 2H Stance Sub Character
Fields.Description: Secondary character alignment for RH 2H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: Right 2H Stance Sub Weapon
Fields.Description: Secondary weapon alignment for RH 2H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: Left 2H Stance Main Character
Fields.Description: Character alignment reference for LH 2H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: Left 2H Stance Main Weapon
Fields.Description: Weapon alignment reference for LH 2H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: Left 2H Stance Sub Character
Fields.Description: Secondary character alignment for LH 2H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: Left 2H Stance Sub Weapon
Fields.Description: Secondary weapon alignment for LH 2H stance.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: RH Storage Character
Fields.Description: Character positioning reference when weapon is stowed in RH slot.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: RH Storage Weapon
Fields.Description: Weapon positioning reference when stowed in RH slot.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: LH Storage Character
Fields.Description: Character positioning reference when weapon is stowed in LH slot.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID: LH Storage Weapon
Fields.Description: Weapon positioning reference when stowed in LH slot.

Fields.Name: Equipment Setting: Shooting Category
Fields.Description: Defines the shooting behavior category for ranged weapons.

Fields.Name: Equipment Setting: Weapon Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the classification of the weapon type.

Fields.Name: Equipment Setting: Attack Sound Effect Category
Fields.Description: Determines the sound effect group used for weapon attacks.

Fields.Name: Equipment Setting: Duel-Wielding Permission
Fields.Description: Indicates whether the weapon supports DWing.

Fields.Name: Weapon Sway Reduction Blend Weight [%]
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly weapon sway is reduced during movement.

Fields.Name: Upper Body Twist Blend Weight [%]
Fields.Description: Controls the influence of upper body twisting while handling the weapon.

Fields.Name: Stab Angle Correction: Parry Break [deg]
Fields.Description: Yaw correction angle applied during parry break stab attacks.

Fields.Name: Stab Angle Correction: Guard Break [deg]
Fields.Description: Yaw correction angle applied during guard break stab attacks.

Fields.Name: Stab Angle Correction: Backstab [deg]
Fields.Description: Yaw correction angle applied during backstab attacks.

Fields.Name: Guard Level Type
Fields.Description: Defines the defensive guard strength level.

Fields.Name: Guard Release Speed Category
Fields.Description: Controls how quickly a guard stance is released.

Fields.Name: Parry Type
Fields.Description: Defines the parry behavior type for the weapon.

Fields.Name: Spell Usage Allowed: Dark Miracles
Fields.Description: Determines whether dark miracles can be used with this weapon type.

Fields.Name: LH Damage Scaling %
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied when weapon is used in the LH.

Fields.Name: LH Stamina Damage Scaling %
Fields.Description: Stamina damage multiplier for LH usage.

Fields.Name: LH Durability Damage Scaling %
Fields.Description: Durability damage multiplier for LH usage.

Fields.Name: RH Damage Scaling %
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied when weapon is used in the RH.

Fields.Name: RH Stamina Damage Scaling %
Fields.Description: Stamina damage multiplier for RH usage.

Fields.Name: RH Durability Damage Scaling %
Fields.Description: Durability damage multiplier for RH usage.

Fields.Name: Counter Damage Scaling %
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to counterattack damage.

Fields.Name: Fall Attack Trigger Height %
Fields.Description: Determines required fall distance for fall attacks to trigger.

Fields.Name: Jump Attack Vertical Speed %
Fields.Description: Controls upward velocity during jump attacks.

Fields.Name: Jump Attack Minimum Horizontal Distance %
Fields.Description: Minimum horizontal movement distance during jump attacks.

Fields.Name: Jump Attack Maximum Horizontal Distance %
Fields.Description: Maximum horizontal movement distance during jump attacks.

Fields.Name: Jump Attack Minimum Horizontal Speed %
Fields.Description: Minimum horizontal speed during jump attacks.

Fields.Name: Jump Attack Maximum Horizontal Speed %
Fields.Description: Maximum horizontal speed during jump attacks.

Fields.Name: Jump Falling Attack Trigger Height %
Fields.Description: Required fall distance for jump falling attacks.

Fields.Name: Jump Falling Attack Vertical Speed %
Fields.Description: Vertical speed modifier for jump falling attacks.

Fields.Name: Jump Falling Attack Minimum Horizontal Distance %
Fields.Description: Minimum horizontal distance for jump falling attacks.

Fields.Name: Jump Falling Attack Maximum Horizontal Distance %
Fields.Description: Maximum horizontal distance for jump falling attacks.

Fields.Name: Jump Falling Attack Minimum Horizontal Speed %
Fields.Description: Minimum horizontal speed for jump falling attacks.

Fields.Name: Jump Falling Attack Maximum Horizontal Speed %
Fields.Description: Maximum horizontal speed for jump falling attacks.

Fields.Name: Falling Stab Type
Fields.Description: Defines the type of stab used during falling attacks.

Fields.Name: Damage Weapon Type
Fields.Description: Specifies how the weapon calculates or categorizes damage type.

Fields.Name: Menu Display: Shot Range
Fields.Description: Range value displayed in menus for ranged weapons.

Fields.Name: Grab Attack Animation ID: Backstab
Fields.Description: Animation ID used for backstab grab attack.

Fields.Name: Grab Attack Animation ID: Guard Break Stab
Fields.Description: Animation ID used for guard break stab grab attack.

Fields.Name: Attack LookAt Rotation Limit Left %
Fields.Description: Limits leftward rotation while aiming during attacks.

Fields.Name: Attack LookAt Rotation Limit Right %
Fields.Description: Limits rightward rotation while aiming during attacks.

Fields.Name: Attack LookAt Rotation Limit Up %
Fields.Description: Limits upward rotation while aiming during attacks.

Fields.Name: Attack LookAt Rotation Limit Down %
Fields.Description: Limits downward rotation while aiming during attacks.

Fields.Name: Attack LookAt Visibility Angle Side %
Fields.Description: Controls horizontal visibility range while attacking.

Fields.Name: Attack LookAt Visibility Angle Vertical %
Fields.Description: Controls vertical visibility range while attacking.

Fields.Name: Attack LookAt Horizontal Rotation Speed %
Fields.Description: Controls horizontal turning speed during attacks.

Fields.Name: Attack LookAt Vertical Rotation Speed %
Fields.Description: Controls vertical turning speed during attacks.

Fields.Name: Guard Stamina Recovery %
Fields.Description: Multiplier for stamina recovery while guarding.

Fields.Name: Poise Add Rate: 1H [%]
Fields.Description: Additional poise value when using 1H stance.

Fields.Name: Poise Add Rate: 2H [%]
Fields.Description: Additional poise value when using 2H stance.

Fields.Name: Poise Add Rate: DW 1H [%]
Fields.Description: Additional poise value when DWing 1H.

Fields.Name: Poise Add Rate: DW 2H [%]
Fields.Description: Additional poise value when DWing 2H.

Fields.Name: Melee Auto Pivot Rotation Speed %
Fields.Description: Controls automatic rotation speed during melee targeting.

Fields.Name: Melee Auto Pivot Angle Limit %
Fields.Description: Limits automatic rotation angle during melee combat.

Fields.Name: Manual Pivot Rotation Speed %
Fields.Description: Controls player-driven rotation speed.

Fields.Name: Manual Pivot Angle Limit %
Fields.Description: Limits manual rotation angle.

Fields.Name: Movement Acceleration %
Fields.Description: Adjusts acceleration while changing direction.

Fields.Name: Movement Max Speed %
Fields.Description: Adjusts maximum movement speed.

Fields.Name: Movement Deceleration %
Fields.Description: Adjusts slowing speed while moving.

Fields.Name: Movement Rotation Speed %
Fields.Description: Adjusts turning speed during movement.

Fields.Name: Allow Predictive Shooting
Fields.Description: Determines whether predictive aiming is enabled for ranged attacks.

Fields.Name: Shot Sound Effect Category
Fields.Description: Defines sound effects used for projectile firing.

Fields.Name: Ranged Auto Pivot Rotation Speed %
Fields.Description: Controls automatic rotation speed for ranged weapons.

Fields.Name: Ranged Manual Pivot Rotation Speed %
Fields.Description: Controls manual rotation speed for ranged aiming.

Fields.Name: Spell Chant Time %
Fields.Description: Adjusts casting time for spells.

Fields.Name: Toughness Duration %
Fields.Description: Adjusts duration of poise/toughness effect.

Fields.Name: Shooting Movement Speed Reduction: Strafe [%]
Fields.Description: Speed reduction while moving sideways during shooting stance.

Fields.Name: Shooting Movement Speed Reduction: Walk [%]
Fields.Description: Speed reduction while walking in shooting stance.

Fields.Name: Shooting Movement Speed Reduction: Lock-On Walk [%]
Fields.Description: Speed reduction while lock-on walking in shooting stance.

Fields.Name: Post-Attack Acceleration %
Fields.Description: Controls acceleration after performing an attack.

Fields.Name: Post-Attack Max Speed %
Fields.Description: Controls maximum speed after attacking.

Fields.Name: Post-Attack Deceleration %
Fields.Description: Controls deceleration after attacking.

Fields.Name: Post-Attack Rotation Speed %
Fields.Description: Controls turning speed after attacking.

Fields.Name: Menu Category
Fields.Description: Category used for organizing weapons in menus.

Fields.Name: Precision Shot Camera ID
Fields.Description: Camera parameter ID used for sniping or precision aiming.

Fields.Name: Allow Guard Attack
Fields.Description: Determines whether attacks can be performed while guarding.

Fields.Name: Unknown 138
Fields.Description: Unidentified or unused parameter.

Fields.Name: Mundane Damage Rate
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting a special damage type (previously labeled abyss damage).
